answer: Microsoft's annual revenue for 2024 was $245 billion, marking a 16% increase from the previous year. The company's revenue for 2025 was $281.724 billion.

results.title: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion - The Business Standard
results.snippet: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion. # Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion. ## Microsoft reports $245 billion revenue for Fiscal Year ended June 30, 2024, a 16% increase, driven by strong performance in cloud services and other key sectors. Microsoft revenue reached $245 billion in 2024, showing strong growth. Image of Microsoft headquarters with revenue increase graphic. Microsoft's revenue hits $245B in 2024! Microsoft's revenue climbed to $245 billion in 2024, up from $212 billion the previous year, which represents a 16% increase. Microsoft's 2024 revenue breakdown showing Azure as the top earner, followed by Office, Windows, Gaming (Xbox), and LinkedIn. Revenue percentages shown. Azure leads Microsoft's revenue in 2024 | Illustration: Ashrafun naher Ananna. By the numbers / Microsoft / revenue. * US President Donald Trump is escorted out as a shooter opens fire during the annual White House Correspondents' Association dinner in Washington, DC, US, April 25, 2026, in this screen capture from video.

results.snippet: * Microsoft annual revenue for 2025 was **$281.724B**, a **14.93% increase** from 2024. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2024 was **$245.122B**, a **15.67% increase** from 2023. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2023 was **$211.915B**, a **6.88% increase** from 2022. | Intuit (INTU) | United States | $97.052B | 20.83 |. | Adobe (ADBE) | United States | $91.086B | 12.68 |. | Synopsys (SNPS) | United States | $75.138B | 41.38 |. | Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) | United States | $73.347B | 48.30 |. | CommVault Systems (CVLT) | United States | $3.908B | 37.98 |. | Blackbaud (BLKB) | United States | $1.574B | 12.02 |. | Progress Software (PRGS) | United States | $1.121B | 5.56 |. | OptimizeRx (OPRX) | United States | $0.115B | 9.15 |. | NetSol Technologies (NTWK) | United States | $0.040B | 21.06 |. | Smith Micro Software (SMSI) | United States | $0.018B | 0.00 |.

results.title: Microsoft's Financial Results in FY24 Q4 – AGOLUTION
results.snippet: # FY24 Q4 Microsoft generates almost $65 Billion in Revenue And is one of the leading Companies in the Era of AI. * Microsoft’s **revenue** amounted to **$64.7 billion -** and increased by **15%.**. ## Solid Fiscal Year with Record Bookings and a strong Increase in Cloud Revenue. “We closed out our fiscal year with a solid quarter, highlighted by **record bookings** and **Microsoft Cloud quarterly revenue of $36.8 billion,** up 21% (up 22% in constant currency) year-over-year,” added Amy Hood, Executive Vice President and CFO of Microsoft. **Dynamics products and cloud services revenue** was **16% higher** in FY24 Q4 compared to the same quarter of the previous year, driven by **Dynamics 365 revenue** growth of **19%.**. In the **Intelligent Cloud** segment, **revenue amounted to $28.5 billion,** which was an **increase of 19%.**. * Microsoft achieved **total revenue of $245.1 billion,** an **increase of 16%.**.

results.title: Microsoft's Revenue Hits Record $262 Billion, Net Income Soars to ...
results.snippet: # 📈 Microsoft’s Revenue Hits Record $262 Billion, Net Income Soars to $93 Billion in 2024. 📈 Microsoft’s Revenue Hits Record $262 Billion, Net Income Soars to $93 Billion in 2024. Microsoft posted strong financial results in 2024, with revenue reaching $261.8 billion (up 12.9% year-over-year) and net income rising to $92.8 billion (up 14.5%), resulting in a net profit margin of 35.4%. Since 1995, the company has maintained a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.9% in revenue and 14.5% in net income, underscoring its consistent long-term growth and profitability. ##### Where Data Tells the Story. ###### Home. ###### Support. ###### Creators. ###### Legal. 📈 Microsoft’s Revenue Hits Record $262 Billion, Net Income Soars to $93 Billion in 2024 - Voronoi.
